modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty creating groups for calendar organization in Outlook.

full_description_text: The user is trying to create groups to better organize their calendars in Outlook. They are unsure of the steps required to complete this task. This issue is affecting their ability to manage their scheduling effectively.
short_description: Difficulty creating groups for calendar organization in Outlook.
description: The user is trying to create groups to better organize their calendars in Outlook. They are unsure of the steps required to complete this task. This issue is affecting their ability to manage their scheduling effectively.
